steps: Dilute mouse plasma or serum samples 1:800.

Add 100 μl of standards (50, 25, 12.5, 6.25, 3.12, 1.56 ng/ml) or diluted samples in duplicate into the corresponding wells of the precoated modules and incubate for one hour at room temperature and shaking (300rpm).
Add 100 μl detecting antibody to each well and incubate at room temperature for 1 hour at shaker.
Add 100 μl Substrate solution to each well. Incubate 12-14 min in the dark at room temperature without shaking. Cover with foil during incubation or place in drawer.
Add 100 μl stopping solution to each well. Tap gently to mix.
Read absorbance at 450 nm (reference wave length 620 nm)

Calculate the LBP concentration by first plotting the OD means of standards (y-axis) and the LBP concentration (x-axis). Calculate the LBP concentration from the mean OD of samples from the standard curve and multiply with dilution factor.
creator: Lili Liang
